metadata.name: Enlist — Coalition Skyknight taps Bladetusk Boar to gain +3/+0 until end of turn
metadata.description: p1 controls Coalition Skyknight (2/2, Flying + Enlist) and Bladetusk Boar (3/2, Intimidate). p2 controls no creatures. On turn 4, p1 declares Coalition Skyknight as an attacker targeting p2 and pays the Enlist optional cost by tapping Bladetusk Boar (power 3). CR 702.154a: Enlist has two parts — a static ability (optional tap cost when attacking) and a linked triggered ability. When Bladetusk Boar is tapped for the enlist cost, the linked trigger fires and is placed on the stack. CR 702.154b: the triggered ability is linked to the static ability (CR 607.2h). After both players pass priority, the trigger resolves: Coalition Skyknight gets +3/+0 until end of turn (from Bladetusk Boar's power 3), becoming effective 5/2. p2 has no blockers. After passing to combat damage, Coalition Skyknight deals 5 damage to p2 (40 → 35). Bladetusk Boar is tapped from the enlist cost but is not in combat.
metadata.generation_notes: Coalition Skyknight oracle text (MCP verified): {3}{W}, Creature — Human Knight, 2/2, Flying, Enlist. CardDefinition confirmed at crates/engine/src/cards/defs/coalition_skyknight.rs: KeywordAbility::Flying + KeywordAbility::Enlist. CR 702.154a: 'Enlist means: As this creature attacks, you may tap up to one untapped creature you control that you didn't choose to attack with and that either has haste or has been under your control continuously since this turn began. When you do, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the tapped creature's power.' The enlist static ability is an optional cost paid during declare_attackers (CR 508.1g), not on the stack. The trigger fires linked to the static ability (CR 702.154b, CR 607.2h) and goes on the stack after attackers are declared. Ruling 2022-09-09: 'This is a triggered ability that goes on the stack immediately after attackers have been declared in the declare attackers step.' Bladetusk Boar (Available Cards list): {3}{R}, 3/2, Intimidate — power 3, controlled by p1, untapped, not attacking — legally enlisted. Bladetusk Boar taps as the enlist cost (CR 702.154a) at declare_attackers time, before the trigger resolves. Enlist trigger resolves: Coalition Skyknight gets +3/+0 until end of turn (X = Bladetusk Boar's power = 3). Effective P/T: 5/2. p2 has no creatures; Coalition Skyknight is unblocked (Flying also contributes to evasion, but irrelevant with no blockers). Combat damage (CR 510.1): Coalition Skyknight deals 5 damage to p2 (effective power 5 after trigger). p2 life 40 - 5 = 35. Turn 4 used to ensure no summoning sickness on either creature (CR 302.6). The harness declare_attackers action uses the 'enlist' array with EnlistDeclaration objects {attacker, enlisted} per script_schema.rs. Bladetusk Boar's Intimidate keyword only restricts blocking; it has no effect on being used as an enlist target. CR 702.154c: 'A creature enlists another creature when you pay the cost by tapping the other creature. Note that it isn't possible for a creature to enlist itself.' CR 607.2h documents the linked-ability relationship between the static ability and the triggered ability.

script.step_note: p1 declares Coalition Skyknight as an attacker targeting p2 and pays the Enlist optional cost by tapping Bladetusk Boar (power 3). CR 702.154a: Coalition Skyknight taps as a cost of attacking (CR 508.1f). The Enlist static ability allows p1 to also tap Bladetusk Boar (an untapped, non-attacking creature under p1's control since this turn began). When p1 does so, the linked triggered ability fires and is placed on the stack (CR 702.154b, CR 607.2h). Ruling 2022-09-09: the trigger goes on the stack immediately after attackers are declared.

actions.description: Initial: Coalition Skyknight and Bladetusk Boar both untapped on p1 battlefield; p2 controls no creatures; both players at 40 life; stack empty
actions.note: Turn 4 — both creatures have been controlled since before this turn; no summoning sickness (CR 302.6). p2 controls no creatures. Stack is empty before attack declaration.

CR 508.1: p1 declares Coalition Skyknight as an attacking creature targeting p2. CR 508.1f: Coalition Skyknight taps as a cost of attacking. CR 702.154a: p1 pays the Enlist optional cost by tapping Bladetusk Boar (untapped, not attacking, under p1's control since this turn began — all conditions of CR 702.154a satisfied). CR 702.154b + CR 607.2h: the linked trigger fires and is placed on the stack — 'When you do, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the tapped creature's power.' Bladetusk Boar has power 3; the trigger will grant +3/+0 to Coalition Skyknight when it resolves.

actions.description: After declare_attackers: Coalition Skyknight tapped (attacking), Bladetusk Boar tapped (enlisted as Enlist cost), Enlist trigger on the stack (count 1)
actions.note: CR 508.1f: Coalition Skyknight taps as part of attacking. CR 702.154a: Bladetusk Boar was tapped as the Enlist cost — it is now tapped but not in combat. The linked trigger (CR 702.154b) for the Enlist is on the stack with count 1.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — the Enlist triggered ability (top of stack) resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.154a: Enlist trigger resolves — Coalition Skyknight gets +3/+0 until end of turn, where X = Bladetusk Boar's power (3). Coalition Skyknight becomes effective 5/2 (base 2/2, plus +3/+0 from Enlist until end of turn).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Enlist triggered ability resolves. CR 702.154b: the triggered ability linked to the Enlist static ability grants +X/+0 until end of turn (X = 3 from Bladetusk Boar's power). Coalition Skyknight is now effective 5/2.

actions.description: After Enlist trigger resolves: stack empty; Coalition Skyknight attacking (tapped) and pumped to effective 5/2; Bladetusk Boar tapped (not in combat); life totals unchanged
actions.note: CR 702.154a: Enlist trigger has resolved — Coalition Skyknight has +3/+0 until end of turn (effective 5/2). Bladetusk Boar is tapped from the Enlist cost but remains on the battlefield and is not in combat. Stack is empty. Life totals unchanged — combat damage has not been dealt yet.
CR 116.3d: Both players pass priority with empty stack — advance to DeclareBlockers step.

script.step_note: p2 controls no creatures and cannot declare any blockers. Coalition Skyknight is unblocked.

actions.note: CR 509.1: p2 declares no blockers — p2 controls no creatures. Coalition Skyknight is unblocked.

actions.description: After declare_blockers: no blockers declared; Coalition Skyknight is unblocked; stack empty
actions.note: p2 has no creatures. Coalition Skyknight is an unblocked attacker with effective power 5 (from Enlist +3/+0 until end of turn).
CR 116.3d: Both players pass priority with empty stack — advance to CombatDamage step.

script.step_note: Coalition Skyknight is unblocked. CR 510.1: Combat damage is dealt simultaneously. Coalition Skyknight has effective power 5 (base 2 + 3 from Enlist until end of turn). It deals 5 damage to p2 (40 → 35).

actions.note: CR 510.1: p1 assigns all 5 points of combat damage from Coalition Skyknight (effective power 5) to p2 directly — the creature is unblocked (CR 510.1c). Damage is dealt simultaneously.

actions.description: After combat damage: p2 at 35 life (was 40, took 5 from Coalition Skyknight effective power 5); both creatures on p1 battlefield; stack empty
actions.note: CR 510.1c: Coalition Skyknight (unblocked) deals its full power in damage to p2. Effective power = 5 (base 2/2 + Enlist +3/+0 until end of turn from Bladetusk Boar power 3). p2 life: 40 - 5 = 35. Coalition Skyknight (2/2 base, 5/2 effective) is not destroyed — no lethal damage marked on it (it dealt damage, not received). Bladetusk Boar is tapped but on the battlefield unharmed.
